calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maria Del Pilar Alzamora, Plaintiff/Respondent appears as Propria Persona.
Bellarose A. Baclig, Defendant/Appellant appears as Prpria Persna with witness/cleaning person Deresida Mecedo.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Maria Del Pilar Alzamra , Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibits not marked - 2 certification of mailing

Bellarose A. Baclig, Appellant/ Defendant, testifies on his/her own behalf. The Following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exh (1) - pictures.
Exh (2) - contractor invoices & receipts.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Plaintiff/respondent's unmarked exhibits are returned and Defendant/appellant's exhibits are retained with the file.

Judge Pro tem David Fleisig, Clerk Jean Kong, Not Reported (D525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Judgment Entered
